title: Nucor Stock Rally Could Run Up To Fresh Record Highs
text: The steel sector has been in focus lately, after President Joe Biden's re-election campaign adviser Brian Deese raised concerns about Nippon Steel's acquisition of U.S. Steel (X). Nucor (NUE) stock has been in rally mode since news of the acquisition broke on Monday, today hitting its highest level since February with support from its 20-day moving average.

title: 4 Steel Stocks to Buy as X Agrees to $14.9 Billion Deal
text: X marked the spot for investors on Monday. Shares of U.S. Steel (NYSE: X ) surged more than 25% on the news that Japan's Nippon Steel had agreed to buy the iconic Pittsburgh-based steel company for $14.9 billion.

title: Why Are Steel Stocks X, CLF, NUE, STLD Up Today?
text: Steel stocks for U.S. companies are rising today after U.S. Steel (NYSE :X ) announced that it will be bought by Nippon Steel (OTCMKTS: NPSCY ). Shares in the iconic American steelmaker are jumping more than 25% on the news.
